name: Cloudflare Pages
description: Cloudflare Pages — Static and full-stack hosting on Cloudflare's edge network with Workers integration and unlimited bandwidth.

seo.title: Cloudflare Pages — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Cloudflare Pages: Cloudflare Pages — Static and full-stack hosting on Cloudflare's edge network with Workers integration and unlimited bandwidth.

when_to_use: Deploying JAMstack sites on Cloudflare's edge from GitHub
Full-stack Next.js hosting with integrated Workers functions
Unlimited bandwidth static hosting with global CDN
Preview deployments for every pull request automatically
Replacing Netlify or Vercel for teams already on Cloudflare

cons: Workers size and CPU limits bite
Build minutes capped on free tier
review.verdict: The best free tier in static/full-stack hosting, with edge constraints you must design around.
review.best_for: Static sites and edge-first full-stack apps already on Cloudflare
review.not_for: Heavy Node.js monoliths that assume a full server runtime
